videos.headline: Tai Felton snags impressive 9-yard Maryland TD
videos.description: Tai Felton elevates and makes an impressive catch for a 9-yard touchdown, extending Maryland's lead over Villanova.

videos.headline: Billy Edwards Jr. throws an 18-yard dart for Maryland's first TD
videos.description: Billy Edwards Jr. finds Kaden Prather for an 18-yard touchdown on Maryland's opening drive against Villanova.
